creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #3)

Since you're set as MAINTAINER, reviews are technically a formality and approval (from anyone else) is not *strictly* a requirement.

If you're happy with the changeset and QA (poudriere, etc), there's no need to wait on others, though since Will (wca@) has a put much time into rust ports, it's certainly 'nice' to get everyone's input.

Down the track, a rust@ team alias might be handy so that anyone on the team (recipients list) can commit updates to the port
